name: Enterprise Financial Services Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 5% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Enterprise Financial Services Corporation Depositary Shares represent a portion of a share of the company's preferred stock, offering fixed dividend payments. Enterprise Financial Services Corporation is a financial holding company that provides banking and wealth management services. The depositary shares allow investors to own a fractional interest in the preferred stock, simplifying ownership and dividend distribution.
